top_findings.summary: The skill requires running with `--dangerously-skip-permissions` to bypass Claude's permission system entirely, which grants unrestricted access to system resources and data unrelated to iterative software development. While autonomous development loops may require file system access, bypassing all permission checks eliminates essential safety boundaries and could allow actions far beyond the stated purpose of building software (e.g., accessing sensitive system files, modifying unrelated data, or executing arbitrary commands).
